actions.script: var googleBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-testid="login-with-google"]'); if (googleBtn) { googleBtn.click(); return 'google_clicked'; } var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) { if (btns[i].textContent.indexOf('Continue with Google') !== -1 || btns[i].textContent.indexOf('Google') !== -1) { btns[i].click(); return 'google_clicked'; } } return 'google_not_found';

if (window.location.hostname.indexOf('accounts.google.com') !== -1) { var account = document.querySelector('div[data-identifier][role="link"]') || document.querySelector('div[data-identifier]') || document.querySelector('.VV3oRb[role="link"]'); if (account) { account.click(); return 'account_clicked'; } return 'account_not_found'; } return 'not_google_page';

if (window.location.hostname.indexOf('accounts.google.com') !== -1) { var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var j = 0; j < btns.length; j++) { if (btns[j].textContent.trim() === 'Continue' || btns[j].textContent.indexOf('Continue') !== -1) { btns[j].click(); return 'continue_clicked'; } } var continueBtn = document.querySelector('button span[jsname="V67aGc"]')?.closest('button'); if (continueBtn && continueBtn.textContent.indexOf('Continue') !== -1) { continueBtn.click(); return 'continue_clicked'; } return 'continue_not_found'; } return 'not_google_page';

if (window.location.hostname.indexOf('accounts.google.com') !== -1) { var account = document.querySelector('div[data-identifier][role="link"]') || document.querySelector('div[data-identifier]') || document.querySelector('.VV3oRb[role="link"]'); if (account) { account.click(); return 'account_clicked_retry'; } var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var j = 0; j < btns.length; j++) { if (btns[j].textContent.trim() === 'Continue' || btns[j].textContent.indexOf('Continue') !== -1) { btns[j].click(); return 'continue_clicked_retry'; } } return 'elements_not_found'; } return 'not_google_page';

if (window.location.hostname.indexOf('accounts.google.com') !== -1) { var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var j = 0; j < btns.length; j++) { if (btns[j].textContent.trim() === 'Continue' || btns[j].textContent.indexOf('Continue') !== -1) { btns[j].click(); return 'continue_clicked_final'; } } return 'continue_not_found'; } return 'not_google_page';
